<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth; use App\Http\Controllers\Controller; use App\Models\User; use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Registered; use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse; use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash; use Illuminate\Validation\Rules; use Inertia\Inertia; use Inertia\Response; class RegisteredUserController extends Controller { /** * Display the registration view. */ public function create(): Response { return Inertia::render('Auth/Register'); } /** * Handle an incoming registration request. * * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException */ public function store(Request $request): RedirectResponse { $request->validate([ 'name' => 'required|string|max:255', 'email' => 'required|string|lowercase|email|max:255|unique:'.User::class, 'password' => ['required', 'confirmed', Rules\Password::defaults()], ]); $user = User::create([ 'name' => $request->name, 'email' => $request->email, 'password' => Hash::make($request->password), ]); event(new Registered($user)); Auth::login($user); return redirect(route('dashboard', absolute: false)); } }
